notes: Active as of 2026-05-17. Base ratio is typically 1:2, so this offer is commonly shown as 1,000 Membership Rewards -> 2,400 Hilton Honors points. Verify in Amex before transfer.

Active as of 2026-05-17. This is the post-early-bird rate after the 65% Chase-Marriott bonus ended May 15. Commonly shown as 1,000 Ultimate Rewards -> 1,550 Marriott Bonvoy points. Verify in Chase before transfer.
